result.reason: RDP sessions fail after opening multiple connections, suggesting a resource leak or exhaustion issue that requires an application restart to resolve.
result.approach: Investigate RDP connection management classes for proper resource disposal (IDisposable implementations) and ensure all unmanaged resources and event handlers are correctly released upon connection closure. Focus on potential leaks when multiple RDP sessions are opened and closed.
